name: the consult engine auto-composes rubric/aggregator.sh to build the full surface when --surface is omitted
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'rules_total=118 namespaces_total=[0-9]+' e.txt && echo auto-composes-aggregator 1>&2
